name: cold-email-generator
description: Generates and refreshes cold email copy with spintax formatting for instantly.ai campaigns. Supports 4 proven email types: Personalisation-led, Case Study-led, Bullet Point, and Condensed. Pairs with client-brief-generator: when client-brief.md is present, pulls value props, case studies, credibility, and sender info from the brief. Refuses to generate without sender name+title, target persona, and email type (asks the user if missing), and scans output for unfilled bracket placeholders before returning.
